title: Create Live 6
description: Modpack based on the Mod Create, this time with a secondary new Mod Ars Nouveau!
body: ### Create Live 6 — Magic Meets Mechanic Welcome to Create Live 6! Originally developed for a German content creator group, Create Live began as a modpack focused on the innovative Create mod. Now, in its sixth season, we’re excited to introduce a brand new dimension to your gameplay by adding Ars Nouveau as a secondary core mod. > **WARNING**: This Modpacks doesn't contain every Mod the Curseforge Edition contains. This is due to some Mods aren't available in Modrinth (like FTB Mods, some Ars and Create Addons). If you want the full experience, you need to get the Mods by yourself What’s New in Create Live 6? - A Blend of Magic and Engineering: Use Ars Nouveau’s powerful magic system to enhance and complement your Create contraptions. Whether you prefer mastering machinery, wielding magic, or combining both, the choice is yours! - Expanded Content: Enjoy a wide selection of addons for both Create and Ars Nouveau, offering more tools, mechanics, and creative possibilities than ever before. - Latest Minecraft Features: Explore all the new content from Minecraft 1.21.1 alongside the massive Create v0.6 update, which introduces a revolutionary ME-like storage system. - Guideline Questbook: Start your journey in the Overworld with a Questbook that offers a general guideline. The Questbook highlights potential items you can craft and points you toward possible goals, but leaves you free to explore and experiment at your own pace. - Custom Dimensions: Discover brand new, custom-built dimensions! Using a unique item called the Gem, you can open portals to these new worlds and uncover their secrets.   [](https://blizzor.de/cl5-server) Special Thanks goes to: - Lavundel: Building the Mainmenu and Custom Item/Block Textures - Grandiras: Building the 2 Dimensions via Datapacks (Mining Dimension, Ars Monde) - Robocraft: Developing the Portal-Gems Mod for accessing the new Dimensions and Ars Monde Lib
